name: Igamon

signature_move.name: Iga-ryū Shuriken Nage
signature_move.description: Throws one or more large shuriken at the enemy.

description: A mysterious Digimon wearing a red mask. It is wandering the Digital World and building its training. It is a master of espionage, and if it is hiding within the trees of a forest, or hiding underwater, catching sight of its figure is considerably difficult. Also, although it differs in school and doctrine from Revolmon , who is also one of the " Virus Busters ", they are comrades in arms since olden times, and are also good rivals. Its Special Move is using a gigantic shuriken ( Iga-ryū Shuriken Nage ).
